name: Narrator tds
description:
An alliance formed through a common goal.

“The Narrator is a performer from the Old World who used to be the right-hand man of Lord Exo. After being used for his revival, he achieved his theatrical moment on stage, striking a deal with Commander. He relies on his hands Righty and Lefty who were empowered by Lord Exo, making them some of the most powerful entities in existence.”
creator: ilovegassyMILFS
